title: Shimizu Global files PKPU lawsuit against PP Urban
body: PT Shimizu Global Indonesia (SGI) sues PT PP Urban, a subsidiary of PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP), for Suspension of Debt Paymen Obligation (PKPU).

title: A year debuting, KOKA and LOPI crashed
body: PT Koka Indonesia Tbk (KOKA) and PT Logisticsplus International Tbk (LOPI) plummeted a year after debuting on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) via initial public offering on October 11, 2023.

title: Unusual spike, stock authorities suspend BCIC and JSPT
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authorities have suspended PT Bank JTrust Indonesia Tbk (BCIC) and PT Jakarta Setiabudi Internasional Tbk (JSPT) due to significant and rapid surge in stock prices.

title: AKRA to form a new subsidiary for managing warehouse
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) has established its newest subsidiary called PT Terminal Energi Primer (TEP).

title: VICI to issue interim dividend of IDR 23.47 billion
body: PT Victoria Care Indonesia Tbk (VICI) will distribute interim dividend of IDR 23.47 billion from its net profit in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Shimizu Global files PKPU lawsuit against PP Urban
body: PT Shimizu Global Indonesia (SGI) sues PT PP Urban, a subsidiary of PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP), for Suspension of Debt Paymen Obligation (PKPU).

title: A year debuting, KOKA and LOPI crashed
body: PT Koka Indonesia Tbk (KOKA) and PT Logisticsplus International Tbk (LOPI) plummeted a year after debuting on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) via initial public offering on October 11, 2023.

title: Unusual spike, stock authorities suspend BCIC and JSPT
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authorities have suspended PT Bank JTrust Indonesia Tbk (BCIC) and PT Jakarta Setiabudi Internasional Tbk (JSPT) due to significant and rapid surge in stock prices.

title: AKRA to form a new subsidiary for managing warehouse
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) has established its newest subsidiary called PT Terminal Energi Primer (TEP).

title: VICI to issue interim dividend of IDR 23.47 billion
body: PT Victoria Care Indonesia Tbk (VICI) will distribute interim dividend of IDR 23.47 billion from its net profit in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: BDDC JST 1 officially operate, now collaborating with APJII for IIX-JK2
body: Bersama Digital Data Centre (BDDC) held the Grand Opening of BDDC JST 1, its latest data centre in Jatinegara, East Jakarta, today (9/10).

title: Yesterday’s sukuk auction bids clocked up to IDR 14.84 trillion
body: The amount of incoming bids recorded in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk last Tuesday (8/10), reportedly hit IDR 14.81 trillion.

title: CUAN reported 2,050% surge since IPO
body: The stock price of PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk (CUAN) has skyrocketed 2,050% to IDR 7,050 this afternoon (9/10) compared to its initial public offering (IPO) on March 8, 2023.

title: Indonesia Infrastructure Finance eyes IDR 1 trillion in bond issuance
body: PT Indonesia Infrastructure Finance (IIF), an infrastructure financing company, is targeting IDR 1 trillion of fresh fund from the issuance of Shelf-Registration Bond II Phase II Year 2024.

title: Gojek Tokopedia's share sales surpassed 1 billion, with net foreign volume at -440.41 million
body: PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the greatest sales on Tuesday, October 8, with 1.14 billion shares sold and a net volume of -297.64 million shares. This sale boosted foreign selling volume to 4.15 billion shares, while causing net foreign volume to close at -440.41 million shares, as foreign buying volume was only 3.71 billion shares.

title: Aladin Global acquires 5.84 billion shares of Bank Aladin Syariah (BANK)
body: With a remarkable volume of 5.84 billion shares, PT Aladin Global Ventures purchased shares of PT Bank Aladin Syariah Tbk (BANK) on Friday, October 4. This investor's share portion increased to 50.62% from 11.06% after its most recent purchase through PT Pacific Sekuritas Indonesia. Presently, Aladin Global holds a majority stake in the digital Sharia bank.

title: PTPS and KOCI decline a year after stock exchange debut
body: Stock performance of two issuers, PT Pulau Subur Tbk (PTPS) and PT Kokoh Exa Nusantara Tbk (KOCI), stumbled after one-year debuting in the stock exchange, on October 6 and 9, 2023.

title: CBRE to end vessel charter contract with Habco Trans Maritima
body: PT Cakra Buana Resources Energi Tbk (CBRE), a marine transportation service provider, has ended the vessel charter contract with PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk (HTMA).

title: Petrotech to invest IDR 92.45 billion on Pertamina’s fuel oil piping
body: PT Petrotech Penta Nusa, a subsidiary of PT Rukun Raharja Tbk (RAJA), planted investment of IDR 982.45 billion in the fuel oil piping project of Tanjung Batu-Samarinda.

title: Astra Otoparts to set up interim dividend of IDR 57 per share
body: PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO), an automotive spare part manufacturer of Astra Group, announced its plan to allocate interim dividend of IDR 57 per share or IDR 274.72 billion in total.

title: Astra Otoparts to set up interim dividend of IDR 57 per share
body: PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO), an automotive spare part manufacturer of Astra Group, announced its plan to allocate interim dividend of IDR 57 per share or IDR 274.72 billion in total.

title: Indocement to form another JV with Japan's Amita Group
body: PT Indocement Tunggal Prakarsa Tbk (INTP) has invested 20% of capital, or IDR 2 billion, in PT Amita Prakarsa Hijau (APH), a joint venture established by Amita Group from Japan.

title: Negative equity, Logindo Samudera Makmur to hold private placement
body: PT Logindo Samudera Makmur Tbk (LEAD), an oil and natural gas services company, will carry out additional capital without granting pre-emptive rights (PMTHMETD) or private placement.

title: Share sales hit 5.78 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at minus 1 billion shares
body: On Monday, October 7, share sales transactions by foreign investors resulted in foreign sales volume up to 5.78 billion shares. With a foreign buying volume of only 4.78 billion shares, the net foreign volume eventually ended at -1 billion shares. One of the largest contributors to the high foreign sales volume was the sale of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), which reached 2.22 billion shares with a net volume of -784.34 million shares.

title: JCI regained strength at last minute
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) regained strength at the closing bell today (8/10). This is an improvement from its opening position, in which JCI dropped to 7,455.23.

title: Expanding market to MSMEs, Master Print confident of double-digit growth post-IPO
body: PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR), a packaging manufacturer freshly debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) today (8/10), is preparing to see significant growth of up to double digit at the end of this year and next year, driven by new product launch.

title: Astra Graphia to distribute interim dividend of IDR 25.63 billion
body: PT Astra Graphia Tbk (ASGR), one of many subsidiaries of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII), announced its plan to allocate interim dividend of IDR 25.63 billion or IDR 19 per share.

title: Officially debuting, Verona Indah Pictures to challenge movie industry and double revenue
body: PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk (VERN) has officially made its debut on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) as of today (8/10), offering 1.12 billion shares for IDR 195 each.

title: NETV management board resigns
body: The Board of Commissioners and Directors of PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) collectively submitted their resignations to shareholders yesterday (7/10).

title: Divesting treasury shares, KEJU bags IDR 8.98 billion
body: PT Mulia Boga Raya Tbk (KEJU), a processed food manufacturer known with its brand Prochiz, has divested 5.98 million shares in its treasury stock.

title: INDY’s subsidiary to divest 60% in MEA
body: PT Indika Indonesia Resources (IIR), a subsidiary of PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY), has divested 60% of PT Mitra Energi Agung (MEA) to PT Niaga Gilang Persada (NGP).

title: IDX claims security issuance hit 75% of target
body: PT Bursa Efek Indonesia (BEI) or Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) claims that the realisation of security issuance has reached 75% of total target of 410 this year.

title: Plaza Indonesia Realty to ready interim dividend of IDR 236.89 billion
body: PT Plaza Indonesia Realty Tbk (PLIN), a real estate developer and management company, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 236.89 billion or IDR 67 per share.

title: TBS Energi Utama to divest PLTU of 200 MW for USD 144.8 million
body: PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk (TOBA) has divested its asset in the form of steam power plant (PLTU) with total capacity of 200 MW operated by two of its subsidiaries, PT Minahasa Cahaya Lestari (MCL) and PT Gorontalo Listrik Perdana (GLP).

title: More than 80 million Media Nusantara Citra (MNCN) shares released by Global Mediacom
body: PT Global Mediacom Tbk, the company's controlling shareholder, released 80.52 million shares of PT Media Nusantara Citra Tbk (MNCN) on Thursday, October 3. Both issuers are media-related members of the MNC Group. Prior to this most recent sale, Global Mediacom owned 40.24% of MNCN; however, its share portion has now dropped to 39.7%. This transaction was carried out through PT KB Valbury Sekuritas.

title: MEDC set up tender offer of 2 subsidiaries’ bonds, here’s the result
body: PT Medco Energi Internasional Tbk (MEDC) announces the result of tender offer of two Senior Bonds maturing in 2026 and 2027 issued by two of its subsidiaries, namely Medco Oak Tree Pte, Ltd dan Medco Bell Pte Ltd.

title: PGAS eyes 15 BBTUD industrial gas potential in Sulawesi
body: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara (PGAS) or PGN is eyeing the potential of industrial natural gas development with total volume of up to 15 BBTUD in Sulawesi through the signing of 2 Memorandums of Understanding (MoU).

title: TOBA allocates IDR 474.58 billion for buyback
body: PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk (TOBA) is allocating IDR 474.58 billion to repurchase (buyback) a maximum of 10% of total issued and paid-up capital.

title: FILM to take over NETV management
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM) will branch out to television broadcast industry following the acquisition of PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV), the operator of NET Televisi.

title: Global venture funding slowed down in Q3 2024, mostly went to AI sector
body: The amount of venture capital funding in the global market reached USD 66.5 billion in the third quarter (Q3) of 2024, slowing down 16% quarter-to-quarter (qoq), or down 15% year-on-year (yoy).
